name: sqleasy-monorepo
description: Polyglot, contract-first monorepo for SQLEasy — the query builder and execution engine across TypeScript, Dart, Python, C#, and Go, held to one another by a shared golden contract.

scripts.check: turbo run typecheck && pnpm check:deps && pnpm check:parity && pnpm check:surface && pnpm check:contract && pnpm check:capabilities
scripts.harness:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.harness.yml up -d --wait && pnpm harness:seed
scripts.harness:seed: docker compose -f docker-compose.harness.yml exec -T postgres psql -q -U sqleasy -d sqleasy_ci < harness/seed/postgres.sql && docker compose -f docker-compose.harness.yml exec -T mysql mysql -uroot -psqleasy_ci sqleasy_ci < harness/seed/mysql.sql && docker compose -f docker-compose.harness.yml exec -T mssql /opt/mssql-tools18/bin/sqlcmd -C -S localhost -U sa -P 'SqlEasy_ci_1!' < harness/seed/mssql.sql
